subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Who hath created the heavens through the Pen of Thy creation and the earths through the breaths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی خلقت السموات من قلم ابداعک و الارضین من نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
